visual: Bar Graphs (Mode 1: Reading). Vertical. Same bar graph. Green bar highlighted (height = 50). Axis lines glow sequentially: 10, 20, 30, 40, 50.
guide: "Green shows 50. Let's count by 10s to check: 10, 20, 30, 40, 50."
guide_2: "You already know how to count by 10s. That's exactly what we do with scale of 10. The fourth bar shows Yellow. Count by 10s—what value does the bar show?"
visual_2: (follow-up) Yellow bar highlighted (height = 20). Axis available for reference.
remediation_light: "Start at 0. Count by 10s until you reach the top of the bar."
